question: A production application suddenly starts returning 500 errors, but infrastructure metrics look normal. How would you investigate?
CPU usage on your Kubernetes nodes is low, but applications are experiencing slow response times. What would you check?
Users report intermittent failures accessing an application, but you cannot reproduce the issue. How would you approach the investigation?
A service works correctly internally but is unreachable from the internet. What components would you verify first?
Multiple alerts are triggered simultaneously after a deployment. How would you determine the root cause?
A production pod keeps restarting every few minutes. What would be your troubleshooting process?
A database suddenly becomes the bottleneck during peak traffic. How would you identify the cause?
DNS resolution is failing for some services but not others. How would you isolate the problem?
An application works in one availability zone but fails in another. What could cause this?
A customer reports slow performance only during business hours. How would you investigate?
Your application is expected to handle 10x more traffic next year. How would you prepare the cloud architecture?
A business application requires 99.99% availability. How would you design the infrastructure?
A workload contains both stateless and stateful components. How would you architect them differently?
Your organization wants to move from a monolithic application to microservices. What cloud services would you introduce?
You need to design a disaster recovery strategy with an RPO of 15 minutes and an RTO of 30 minutes. How would you achieve it?
How would you design a multi-region architecture for a customer-facing application?
A customer wants to migrate to the cloud without changing the application. What migration strategy would you recommend?
How would you design a secure landing zone for a new business unit?
Your application uses both VMs and containers. How would you decide where each workload should run?
A legacy application cannot be containerized. How would you modernize it gradually?
Pods are stuck in Pending state. How would you troubleshoot?
Pods are healthy, but traffic is not reaching them. What would you investigate?
A deployment succeeds, but the new version is unavailable. How would you debug it?
Cluster autoscaler is not adding nodes even though pods remain unscheduled. What could be wrong?
Kubernetes is consuming much more memory than expected. How would you identify the cause?
A node becomes NotReady. What would you check first?
One namespace is consuming most of the cluster resources. How would you prevent this?
Applications require zero-downtime deployments. Which Kubernetes features would you use?
A Secret was accidentally exposed. What steps would you take?
Your etcd storage is growing rapidly. How would you investigate?
Multiple engineers are modifying the same Terraform project. How would you avoid conflicts?
Terraform state becomes corrupted. How would you recover?
Someone manually modified cloud resources outside Terraform. How would you reconcile the environment?
Your Terraform plan shows hundreds of unexpected changes. What would you do?
Different environments require slightly different configurations. How would you organize the code?
A Terraform apply failed halfway through. How would you recover?
You inherit Terraform code with no documentation. How would you understand and improve it?
How would you safely upgrade Terraform provider versions across multiple environments?
Sensitive values are currently stored in Terraform variables. How would you secure them?
Multiple teams share Terraform modules. How would you manage module versioning?
A deployment passes all tests but fails in production. What additional checks would you introduce?
Pipeline execution time has doubled over the last few months. How would you optimize it?
Developers frequently merge broken code into the main branch. How would you improve the workflow?
A deployment partially succeeds, leaving production in an inconsistent state. How would you prevent this?
One stage in the pipeline fails randomly. How would you investigate?
How would you implement progressive delivery in your deployment pipeline?
How would you deploy database schema changes with minimal downtime?
Your pipeline depends on external services that are frequently unavailable. How would you improve reliability?
How would you secure secrets used during pipeline execution?
How would you ensure deployment consistency across development, staging, and production?
CPU, memory, and disk metrics all look normal, but users still experience latency. What would you investigate?
You have thousands of alerts every day. How would you reduce alert fatigue?
Management wants Service Level Objectives (SLOs). How would you define them?
What metrics would you monitor for a Kubernetes cluster?
How would you determine whether an alert should be warning or critical?
A dashboard looks healthy, but customers are reporting failures. How would you investigate?
How would you improve observability for distributed microservices?
Which Golden Signals would you monitor for a web application?
How would you trace a request across multiple microservices?
What metrics would indicate that autoscaling is not working properly?
Two applications in different VNets cannot communicate. How would you troubleshoot?
An application is timing out only when accessing external APIs. What would you check?
How would you troubleshoot intermittent packet loss in the cloud?
A load balancer is healthy, but users cannot access the application. What would you verify?
Traffic between services is unencrypted. How would you secure it?
You need to expose an internal application securely to partners. How would you design it?
How would you troubleshoot asymmetric routing?
A firewall rule change caused an outage. How would you quickly identify the issue?
Private endpoints are configured, but traffic still goes through the public internet. Why?
Your VPN connection experiences intermittent disconnects. How would you troubleshoot?
A developer accidentally committed cloud credentials to GitHub. What would you do?
Your organization wants least-privilege access everywhere. How would you implement it?
A security audit found overly permissive IAM roles. How would you remediate them?
Containers are running as root users. How would you improve security?
How would you securely rotate secrets without application downtime?
A vulnerability is discovered in a base Docker image. What actions would you take?
Developers require temporary production access. How would you manage it securely?
How would you enforce encryption across all storage services?
Security wants all cloud resources to comply with company policies automatically. How would you implement this?
How would you detect unauthorized configuration changes in production?
Compute costs doubled over the last quarter. How would you investigate?
Kubernetes costs continue increasing despite stable traffic. What would you check?
Developers provision resources and forget to delete them. How would you solve this?
How would you identify underutilized cloud resources?
Storage costs are increasing every month. What would you analyze?
Leadership wants a monthly cloud cost forecast. How would you provide it?
Reserved Instances or Savings Plans are available. How would you determine whether to purchase them?
Multiple environments remain running after business hours. How would you optimize costs?
How would you allocate cloud costs to individual business units?
A new service is expensive but business-critical. How would you optimize cost without affecting performance?
A service repeatedly violates its SLA. How would you improve reliability?
How would you define Service Level Indicators (SLIs) for an API platform?
Your error budget is exhausted halfway through the quarter. What actions would you take?
A recurring incident keeps happening every month. How would you eliminate it permanently?
Leadership wants fewer incidents, but engineering wants faster releases. How would you balance both?
How would you prioritize technical debt versus feature delivery?
An on-call engineer is overwhelmed with alerts. How would you improve the situation?
How would you conduct a blameless postmortem after a major outage?
How would you measure operational maturity for an engineering team?
A service is highly reliable but very expensive to maintain. How would you improve efficiency?
Different teams are building infrastructure in different ways. How would you standardize the platform?
Your engineering teams have different deployment processes. How would you create a common platform?
Developers frequently request infrastructure manually. How would you introduce self-service?
Multiple teams are using different monitoring tools. How would you consolidate observability?
How would you encourage developers to adopt Infrastructure as Code?
A platform upgrade affects hundreds of applications. How would you minimize risk?
How would you measure the success of a DevOps transformation?
Teams are resistant to adopting GitOps. How would you drive adoption?
Leadership wants platform reliability metrics. Which KPIs would you present?
Your organization wants to improve developer productivity. What platform capabilities would you introduce?
After migrating workloads to the cloud, users complain about latency. How would you isolate whether the issue is network, compute, or application related?
Your cloud bills are rising, but the business is not seeing any clear value increase. How would you investigate the cost drivers?
A new cloud environment was created quickly for a project and now it lacks governance. What would you do first?
Security wants stricter access controls, but engineering teams need quick access for deployments. How would you design permissions?
You need to migrate an application that depends on on-premises systems. How would you plan the connectivity and cutover?
A cloud resource was accidentally deleted by a developer. How would you prevent this from happening again?
Your organization uses two cloud providers. How would you ensure consistency in naming conventions, monitoring, and deployments?
A backup failed silently, and no one noticed until restore time. How would you improve backup validation and recovery readiness?
The team is making manual changes to cloud resources through the console. How would you transition them back to Infrastructure as Code (IaC)?
A critical service requires high availability across multiple regions. How would you design the failover strategy?
Your deployment pipeline is working in staging but failing intermittently in production. How would you investigate the difference?
A developer says the build is too slow and wants to bypass the pipeline. How would you respond?
Your team has multiple manual steps in deployment. Which step would you automate first and why?
Production logs show errors, but no one is sure whether the issue is code, infrastructure, or configuration. How would you start troubleshooting?
A recent release caused downtime, but rollback also has risks. How would you decide the safest path?
Your cloud spend increased suddenly after a new release. What checks would you perform first?
A critical security scan in the pipeline is blocking releases. How would you balance speed and security?
Different teams are using different versions of the same tool. How would you standardize the environment?
Your monitoring tool shows alerts during peak traffic. How would you decide whether it is a real incident or noise?
Leadership wants faster releases, but the team is worried about stability. How would you improve both?
